commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh As you did rejoice at the inheritance of the house of Israel, because it was desolate, so will I do unto you: you shall be desolate, O mount Seir, and all Edom, even all of it: and they shall know that I am the LORD. As, is not in the Roman Septuagint. Jerome says it was marked with an asterisk, being taken from Theodotion. (Calmet) Grabe supplies to thou shalt. His copy has the rest:. "thou shalt know that I am their Lord.
